title: Chushathiy #2843
definition:
Hushathite = "inhabitant of Hushah"

 1) an inhabitant of Hushah or a descendant of Hushah; the designation
    given to two of David's mighty warriors
nasbUsage:
Definition: Hushathite = "inhabitant of Hushah"

 1) an inhabitant of Hushah or a descendant of Hushah; the designation
    given to two of David's mighty warriors

    NASB:  perh. an inhab. of Hushah
